qa_pairs.question: What is the NVIDIA Visual Profiler (NVVP)?
qa_pairs.answer: The NVIDIA Visual Profiler (NVVP) is a cross-platform graphical tool used for analyzing codes written with OpenACC and CUDA C/C++ instructions.

qa_pairs.question: Which types of code can the NVIDIA Visual Profiler (NVVP) analyze?
qa_pairs.answer: The NVIDIA Visual Profiler (NVVP) is an analyzing tool designed for codes written with OpenACC and CUDA C/C++ instructions.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if an executable being profiled by the NVIDIA Visual Profiler (NVVP) does not use a GPU?
qa_pairs.answer: If the executable being profiled by the NVIDIA Visual Profiler (NVVP) is not using the GPU, the profiler will not provide any results.
